briefdescription.para: Sets the options for the OSPIPSV device driver.The options control how the device behaves relative to the OSPIPSV bus.

detaileddescription.para: The device must be idle rather than busy transferring data before setting these device options.

parameterdescription.para: Contains the specified options to be set. This is a bit mask where a 1 indicates the option should be turned ON and a 0 indicates no action. One or more bit Values may be contained in the mask. See the bit definitions named XOSPIPSV_*_OPTIONS in the file xospipsv.h.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if options are successfully set.
XST_DEVICE_BUSY if the device is currently transferring data. The transfer must complete or be aborted before setting options.

briefdescription.para: Gets the options for the OSPIPSV device.

detaileddescription.para: The options control how the device behaves relative to the OSPIPSV bus.

simplesect.para: Options contains the specified options currently set. This is a bit Value where a 1 means the option is on, and a 0 means the option is off. See the bit definitions named XOSPIPSV_*_OPTIONS in file xospipsv.h.

briefdescription.para: Configures the clock according to the prescaler passed.

listitem.para:
XST_FAILURE if failed to set prescaler.
XST_DEVICE_IS_STARTED if the device is already started.
XST_DEVICE_BUSY if the device is currently transferring data. It must be stopped to re-initialize.

briefdescription.para: Configures the edge mode (SDR or DDR).

parameterdescription.para: Edge mode. XOSPIPSV_EDGE_MODE_* represents valid values.

briefdescription.para: Used to signify the OSPIPSV driver that the Hardware flash configuration being used.

detaileddescription.para: This API should be called at least once in the application. If desired, it can be called multiple times when switching between communicating to different flash devices/using different configuration.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_IS_STARTED if the device is already started. It must be stopped to re-initialize.

simplesect.para: If this function is not called at least once in the application, the driver assumes there is a single flash connected to the lower bus and CS line.

briefdescription.para: Configures how the controller will poll the device following a write transfer in DAC mode.

parameterdescription.para: Edge mode. XOSPIPSV_EDGE_MODE_* represents valid values.
